acceptance.proof: The dispatcher exempts a newline-less tracked receipt only when its exact working bytes equal its committed HEAD blob, positively covering immutable LSLC-003M and LSLC-004J.
New or untracked receipts, modified tracked receipts, newline-less non-receipts, and path, private-content, credential, build-artifact, and trailing-whitespace damage remain rejected.
The direct raw checker remains byte-identical, the already-declared policy decision matches implementation, and Standard, documentation/instruction, public-boundary, and workflow routes pass.

commit_policy: Commit lifecycle separately; change only dispatcher exact-HEAD receipt identity plus focused tests/routes. Never edit accepted receipts, historical events, or the direct raw checker.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route exact immutable-receipt identity without weakening any public boundary.
Explain the policy-authority correction and preserved strict raw checker.
Route focused damaged tests and current policy behavior.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Run focused, Standard, and workflow gates.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Existing public/private and workflow lane guidance covers the dispatcher correction.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Reviewed against the resolved 0.5.0 work environment.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Existing validation-authority and immutable-history rules require exact committed identity and fail-closed damage tests.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Reviewed against receipt and validation authority separation.

non_scope: Editing any accepted receipt or historical event, changing tools/check_public_boundaries.py, content/path/binary/UTF-8/private/credential/build/trailing-whitespace rules, newline requirements for mutable or non-receipt files, runtime/API/activation/network/device behavior, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, routing, admission, commands, or authority beyond validation dispatch.
objective: Make the owning dispatcher implement the already-declared historical-evidence-terminal-newline decision by replacing only its fixed-baseline receipt test with exact working-byte equality to the tracked HEAD blob, while preserving every other public-boundary rule and accepted evidence byte-for-byte.
outputs: One dispatcher helper that recognizes only tracked morphospace/receipts files whose exact current bytes equal HEAD.
Focused positive coverage for immutable LSLC-003M and LSLC-004J plus damaged coverage for new, modified, non-receipt, private, credential, path, build, and whitespace cases.
Minimal policy inventory and documentation routing with direct raw-checker immutability proof.
